RESA Power adds the missing post-turnover layer between installed electrical gear and ongoing uptime. It is most relevant where a modular AI, bitcoin, or high-density compute site needs preventive maintenance windows, emergency electrical response, replacement support, and continuing switchgear / ATS service after initial energization.
